title: PolicyRegistry
description: Structured registry of national and state educational/digital policies impacting deployment.

NEP.name: National Education Policy 2020
NEP.policy_purpose: Complete overhaul of the Indian school and higher education structure to promote holistic, multi-disciplinary, and digital learning.
NEP.implementation_pathway: Translates to National Curriculum Frameworks (NCF), which are then adapted by individual State Councils (SCERT) into State Curriculum Frameworks (SCF).
NEP.enforcement_posture: Advisory / Collaborative. States are encouraged to adopt the principles, but exact implementation models are left to local state departments.
NEP.known_operational_gap: Significant variation in state-level adoption rates and budgetary allocations for digital infrastructure.
NEP.known_political_sensitivity: Concerns over federal autonomy in education; linguistic policies regarding mother tongue instruction in early school grades.
NEP.known_deployment_dependencies: Dependent on the formulation of local SCFs and the state-level willingness to replace existing systems.

NCF.name: National Curriculum Framework (2023)
NCF.policy_purpose: Provides detailed academic guidelines, pedagogical standards, and curriculum structures mapping to NEP objectives.
NCF.implementation_pathway: Published as model textbooks, teacher handbooks, and classroom pacing outlines to guide standard content creators.
NCF.enforcement_posture: Standard-setting / Voluntary. Actively enforced inside CBSE schools but functions as a model reference for state boards.
NCF.known_operational_gap: Delay in textbook translations and publishing across regional languages, causing teacher confusion.
NCF.known_political_sensitivity: Curriculum revisions, history textbook topics alterations, and inclusion of indigenous knowledge systems.
NCF.known_deployment_dependencies: Dependent on state governments and publishing bureaus (like Balbharati) to align their printed materials with the new guidelines.

Samagra_Shiksha.name: Samagra Shiksha Abhiyan
Samagra_Shiksha.policy_purpose: Integrated state school education scheme spanning pre-school to class 12, focusing on improving school infrastructure and teacher standards.
Samagra_Shiksha.authority_owner: MoE (Union) and State School Education Departments
Samagra_Shiksha.implementation_pathway: Union distributes budgets directly to state-level implementation societies (e.g., MPSP in Maharashtra), who execute works.
Samagra_Shiksha.enforcement_posture: Highly Enforced (Financial). Funding releases are strictly bound to meeting specific operational KPIs and infrastructure reporting.
Samagra_Shiksha.known_operational_gap: Discrepancy in fund utilization at local school committees; delayed infrastructure audits.
Samagra_Shiksha.known_political_sensitivity: Matching grant structures (60:40 split between Union and State) frequently causing bureaucratic friction.
Samagra_Shiksha.known_deployment_dependencies: Dependent on state audit submission timelines and physical vendor deployment capacities.

NIPUN_Bharat.name: National Initiative for Proficiency in Reading with Understanding and Numeracy
NIPUN_Bharat.policy_purpose: Ensures every child in the country attains foundational literacy and numeracy (FLN) by the end of Grade 3.
NIPUN_Bharat.implementation_pathway: State-level FLN missions run teacher training, distribute learning aids, and conduct routine child assessments.
NIPUN_Bharat.enforcement_posture: Enforced (KPI-Targeted). Monitored via centralized dashboards and dynamic child-level assessments.
NIPUN_Bharat.known_operational_gap: Teacher shortage in rural public schools leading to classroom overcrowding and poor individual student focus.
NIPUN_Bharat.known_political_sensitivity: High visibility. Poor performance scores can trigger political debates regarding regional primary school qualities.
NIPUN_Bharat.known_deployment_dependencies: Dependent on teacher availability for customized FLN tracking and local assessment compliance.

PM_SHRI.name: PM Schools for Rising India
PM_SHRI.policy_purpose: Upgrades selected existing public schools into showcase 'green schools' showcasing modern pedagogy and smart technology.
PM_SHRI.authority_owner: Ministry of Education (India) in partnership with State Departments
PM_SHRI.implementation_pathway: Direct central funding allocated to designated schools to construct smart classrooms, solar panels, and scientific labs.
PM_SHRI.enforcement_posture: Strict Compliance. Recipient schools must maintain defined pedagogical standards and transparent infrastructure metrics.
PM_SHRI.known_operational_gap: Uneven selection of schools across districts, leading to local quality imbalances.
PM_SHRI.known_political_sensitivity: Certain opposition-led states initially rejected the scheme due to branding and central naming conventions.
PM_SHRI.known_deployment_dependencies: Dependent on state governments signing MoU agreements with the central ministry.

PM_eVIDYA.name: PM eVIDYA (Digital Education Programme)
PM_eVIDYA.policy_purpose: Unifies all digital, television, and radio efforts for educational continuity, ensuring multi-mode learning access.
PM_eVIDYA.implementation_pathway: Broadcasts educational TV channels (Swayam Prabha), operates Swayam LMS, and updates the DIKSHA platform.
PM_eVIDYA.enforcement_posture: Voluntary / Enabling. Provides digital learning resources freely, leaving consumption tracking to regional schools.
PM_eVIDYA.known_operational_gap: Limited television and high-speed internet access in remote tribal villages, restricting digital benefit delivery.
PM_eVIDYA.known_political_sensitivity: Low, though disputes arise over the proportion of regional language broadcasts compared to Hindi/English.
PM_eVIDYA.known_deployment_dependencies: Dependent on state-level infrastructure (like regional DTH networks) and digital literacy levels among parents.

DPDP.name: Digital Personal Data Protection Act (2023)
DPDP.policy_purpose: Establishes legal framework for processing personal data, demanding strict consent, validation, and child data protection.
DPDP.implementation_pathway: Enforces technical system-level rules regarding how student data is hosted, verified, and audited by digital platforms.
DPDP.enforcement_posture: Statutory / Non-Negotiable. Large financial penalties are active for unauthorized profiling of minor children (students).
DPDP.known_operational_gap: Absence of standard, friction-free mechanism for digital parental consent verification in schools.
DPDP.known_political_sensitivity: Friction between tech providers, educational departments, and private operators regarding student data access.
DPDP.known_deployment_dependencies: Dependent on the framing of final DPDP rules and availability of verified identity infrastructure.

AI_Policy_2026.name: National Strategy and Policy for Artificial Intelligence in Education (2026)
AI_Policy_2026.policy_purpose: Regulates the integration of generative AI tutors, LLM-based RAG engines, and automated assessments in school environments.
AI_Policy_2026.implementation_pathway: Establishes standard guidelines for AI model safety, content filters, and mandatory offline fallbacks in case of cloud outage.
AI_Policy_2026.enforcement_posture: Mandatory Guidelines. System developers must certify their educational AI models before deploying to public school systems.
AI_Policy_2026.known_operational_gap: Lack of local computing hardware to host sovereign AI models offline in rural schools, causing high reliance on cloud vendors.
AI_Policy_2026.known_political_sensitivity: Fears of automated AI bias, replacement of rural teachers, and leak of minor voice biometric data.
AI_Policy_2026.known_deployment_dependencies: Dependent on clean model certifications and local school network uptime stability.

SCF.name: Maharashtra State Curriculum Framework (2025)
SCF.policy_purpose: Adapts the national NCF 2023 to Maharashtra's local cultural, linguistic, and historical context.
SCF.implementation_pathway: Authors curriculum outlines which are handed over to Balbharati for physical textbook publishing.
SCF.enforcement_posture: Mandatory for all state board schools in Maharashtra.
SCF.known_operational_gap: Delays in translating guidelines into all 8 active regional mediums of the state.
SCF.known_political_sensitivity: Syllabus details regarding Maharashtra history, regional languages credit weightages, and local cultural references.
SCF.known_deployment_dependencies: Dependent on MSCERT committee approvals and School Education Department publishing orders.

GR_Ecosystem.name: Maharashtra Government Resolutions (GR) Framework
GR_Ecosystem.policy_purpose: Authoritative administrative decrees governing school schedules, teacher recruitments, technology procurement models, and board rules.
GR_Ecosystem.implementation_pathway: Published as formal GR documents on the state portal, requiring immediate execution by school principals.
GR_Ecosystem.enforcement_posture: Statutory / Strictly Enforced. Non-compliance results in immediate salary blocks or disciplinary action against school staff.
GR_Ecosystem.known_operational_gap: Complex, highly bureaucratized text leading to delays in field comprehension and execution.
GR_Ecosystem.known_political_sensitivity: Very High. GRs regarding teacher transfers, reservation policies, and school funding models frequently spark local debates.
GR_Ecosystem.known_deployment_dependencies: Dependent on smooth bureaucratic coordination and local officer stability.

AI_Curriculum_Mandate.name: Maharashtra Smart Schools AI Curriculum Integration Mandate
AI_Curriculum_Mandate.policy_purpose: Introduces basic AI coding and computational logic in Standard 6 to 10 textbooks across all public state schools.
AI_Curriculum_Mandate.implementation_pathway: Balbharati publishes specialized AI modules; schools utilize computer labs for hands-on pilot training.
AI_Curriculum_Mandate.enforcement_posture: Phased Enforcement. Progressing from urban model schools to rural primary setups over three academic years.
AI_Curriculum_Mandate.known_operational_gap: Severe shortage of trained computer teachers; dilapidated computer lab systems in rural primary centers.
AI_Curriculum_Mandate.known_political_sensitivity: Disparities between urban and rural student outcomes due to differences in computer access.
AI_Curriculum_Mandate.known_deployment_dependencies: Dependent on physical computer lab setups and active state budget allocations for trainer salaries.
